entries.entryBehavior: Introduce the chosen word with blur, then lock it in with a readable hold.
entries.exitBehavior: Return the scene to rest scale instead of snapping away.
entries.notes: Primary word showcase pathway for core phrases and syllabic break moments.

entries.entryBehavior: Bring the two ideas in with lateral separation.
entries.exitBehavior: Release by reducing the visual weight of the weaker side.
entries.notes: Side-by-side comparison moments should not duplicate the same concept twice.

entries.entryBehavior: Rise gently into a side card or contact plate.
entries.exitBehavior: Let the card dissolve instead of bouncing out.
entries.notes: Call and outreach moments should stay concise and visually low-friction.

entries.entryBehavior: Reveal one item at a time in a clean vertical chain.
entries.exitBehavior: Keep the list readable while transitioning to the next step.
entries.notes: Ordered explanation beats should respect semantic order and not split the chain.

entries.entryBehavior: Introduce upward progress with a soft bottom-up lift.
entries.exitBehavior: Loop gently or settle at rest scale, never hard-cut.
entries.notes: Use for growth and progress beats with restrained motion variety.

entries.entryBehavior: Animate numbers with clarity, not spectacle.
entries.exitBehavior: Reduce the number back into the sentence without duplicating it.
entries.notes: Numeric emphasis should not be duplicated in a second literal caption.

entries.entryBehavior: Lift the quote into view with strong hierarchy and low noise.
entries.exitBehavior: Fade the quote without extra punctuation copies.
entries.notes: Quotes should feel editorial and compact, not like a second caption stream.

entries.entryBehavior: Enter with confidence and leave enough visual breathing room.
entries.exitBehavior: Release cleanly after the action is understood.
entries.notes: CTA beats should be restrained and not compete with the spoken close.

entries.entryBehavior: Use as a one-off accent, not as a recurring caption stream.
entries.exitBehavior: Return to calm before the next visual idea.
entries.notes: Bubble/card looks should be rare accents, not a new caption layer.

entries.entryBehavior: Prefer silence and hierarchy instead of stacking more motion.
